category_sources: Official homepage https://xff.cz/megatools/ describes Megatools as programs for accessing Mega.nz from a command line.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is "Megatools - command line client for Mega.nz".
docs_sources: Official homepage is also the maintained project overview and download surface.
Official homepage says online manual pages are available and links to them.
repo_sources: Official homepage states: "GIT repository is available at: https://xff.cz/git/megatools".
The cgit page at https://xff.cz/git/megatools identifies the megatools source repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes copying files and directory trees to and from Mega.nz and streaming downloads.
source_facts.executables lists megacopy, megadl, megaget, megaput, megals, and related tools.
